methodology.blend_selection: rolling-origin Brier score, regularized toward horizon prior and constrained to non-increasing senior weight
methodology.probability_calibration: logit intercept shift so AFC expected qualification probabilities sum to configured slots
methodology.interval: 10th-90th percentile from 1,000 cycle-bootstrap and input-uncertainty draws
exclusions: trial or academy registration without senior minutes

sources.label: AFC Asian Cup Saudi Arabia 2027 final cast
Youth International Experience Is a Limited Predictor of Senior Success
FIFA World Cup 2026 confederation slot allocation
